'''Twilit Hearth''' was the [[Color/Legends|blue]]-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked as a [[Musician/Legends|singer]] of a [[Band/Legends|band]] and partner of [[Sprig Cheever]] at [[Happy's Landing]] on [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]]. She wore [[Clothing/Legends|clothes]] enhancing her physical shape. She allowed [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin|Tinian I'att]] to take her place on stage in order to avoid [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] pursuit.<ref name="TOT">{{JournalCite|4|Tinian on Trial}}</ref>
